title: JustSearch Theme Manifest
description: V1.5.1 theme directory manifest. Lists available themes the host can offer in the picker. V1.5.2 will replace this with a Tauri filesystem watcher that auto-discovers themes; the manifest format remains forward-compatible.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this schema for editor autocomplete.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. V1.5.1 ships v1; future versions add fields without breaking v1 consumers.

themes.description: List of available themes. Order is the picker display order.

id.description: Stable theme id. Used as `userConfig.activeThemeId` and as the picker selection key.

displayName.description: Human-readable label shown in the picker.

description.description: Optional longer description shown under the displayName.

cssPath.description: Path the loader fetches when this theme is selected. Must start with `/` (root-relative).

author.description: Theme author identifier. Plugin-contributed themes carry the plugin id; host themes use `core`.

version.description: Optional theme version (semver-like). Forward-compat for V1.5.2's update flow.
